CYBERSECEVAL is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating the cybersecurity of large language models (LLMs) in generating insecure code and compliance with cyberattacks. It cover...
Details the approach for evaluating LLMs' compliance with requests to assist in cyberattacks, including test case generation and evaluation methods. Discusses the results of app...
Acknowledges contributors and teams involved in the development of CYBERSECEVAL.
